commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an opt-in bundled static catalog fallback to embedded PI model resolution and passes it from runEmbeddedPiAgent, with focused resolver and e2e test updates.

Reproducibility: no. not as a full live Discord/Moonshot reproduction in this read-only pass. The issue logs and current source make the resolver stall source-reproducible, and the PR body supplies after-fix terminal proof for the isolated resolver path.
commands.review_followup: There is a narrow mechanical repair: preserve static lookup ordering while restoring provider normalization/compat for returned static rows and adding regression coverage.

target.title: fix(agent): use static catalog for PI model fast path
target.author: leno23
